query: Agen complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: How to Handle Negative Real Estate Agent Reviews | Mashvisor
results.content:
### 1. Be Proactive

Real estate clients usually post negative real estate reviews as the last resort after every other option fails. Therefore, the best way to minimize bad reviews is to deal with complaints from homebuyers and home sellers quickly. Provide a dedicated phone number and email address for your real estate agent business which your clients can use to leave complaints. These contacts should be posted everywhere- your business cards, social media pages, websites, and paid ads. Whenever customers share a complaint, be sure to resolve it quickly. Keep track of all the grievances and look for patterns that need to be addressed. This way, you can provide solutions even before problems emerge.

### 2. Listen! [...] ### 6. Post an Update

If the problem has been resolved satisfactorily, you could ask the customer to update their real estate agent review. Alternatively, you can go ahead and post an update yourself. Explain what happened and what the problem was exactly. In addition, mention what you did to help fix the issue. If you made a mistake, be sure to own up. Such sincerity will help restore confidence in your customers and prospects.

### 7. Know When to Let It Go [...] ### 2. Listen!

Real estate customers often leave negative real estate agent reviews and comments because they feel that they are not being heard or understood by real estate agents. They resort to an online outburst so that they can reach a wider audience. Others just leave negative reviews for the fun of it or as a deliberate attempt to malign your reputation. When you come across a bad review, the biggest mistake you can make is to ignore it. An unanswered negative real estate agent review will leave consumers with a negative impression of your business. Therefore, even if you don’t agree with the bad review, show real estate leads that you are listening. Let the reviewer know that you have heard them and that you value their feedback.

### 3. Respond Fast and with Kindness

results.title: Customer feedback analysis | AI agent - WRITER
results.content:
For retailers, the customer experience is everything. AI agents can analyze feedback from customer satisfaction surveys, social media comments, and support tickets related to both online and brick-and-mortar stores. They can pinpoint recurring issues, such as long checkout lines, website navigation problems, unhelpful staff interactions, or product availability concerns that impact inventory management decisions. Plus, these systems can monitor feedback about digital shelf performance — analyzing customer complaints about product search results, category placement, or online product information accuracy. By flagging these trends, retail managers can take targeted action to improve operations, optimize inventory levels, enhance digital shelf strategies, train staff, and create a more [...] WRITER Team 

WRITER Team

A shopper might post a glowing Instagram story about your new protein bar’s taste, but in the same breath complain about the confusing nutrition label. Meanwhile, another customer leaves a detailed Amazon review praising your customer service but questioning why your eco-friendly packaging costs extra. From live chat conversations to TikTok unboxings, from post-purchase surveys to Facebook comments — these micro-stories flow through countless customer support channels. For CPG and retail leaders, these aren’t just comments or ratings — they’re the pulse of your market. They’re the early warning signals of trends, and the roadmap to customer loyalty that could make or break your next quarter. [...] This is especially true when dealing with the unstructured nature of most customer feedback. A single social media post or customer support chat can contain multiple sentiments about different aspects of your product or service. A customer might love the new packaging but be frustrated with the shipping time. Traditional customer sentiment analysis tools might average this out to a neutral sentiment score, completely missing the critical details. To truly understand customer feedback and perform sentiment analysis effectively, you need a solution that can conduct aspect-based sentiment analysis, pinpointing exactly what customers think about specific features, policies, or interactions. This deeper level of analysis is what separates brands that simply gather feedback from those that act

results.title: File a Consumer Insurance Complaint | Office of the Commissioner of Insurance and Safety Fire
results.content:
The Consumer Services Division is the investigative arm of OCI. Our job is to ensure fair and equitable dealings between insurers, agents, and policyholders. If you have a complaint about your insurance provider or agent, or how a claim is being handled, we may be able to help you resolve the issue.

< Back to Report Complaints & Fraud

OCI logo

## How Do I … File a Consumer Insurance Complaint?

The Consumer Services Division does not have jurisdiction over the following plans:

Before reaching out to the Consumer Services Division about your dispute, contact your insurance company and ask them to resolve the issue.

If you are unable to resolve your dispute with the insurance company or aren’t satisfied with how they respond to your claim, move to Step 3.

results.title: 10 Best review samples for real estate agents | Birdeye
results.content:
“Thanks to the property manager [Agent Name]for making our end-of-lease transition as smooth as possible. We recently purchased our home and needed to break our lease early. This was as simple as a few emails/phone calls, and they had filled the tenancy within 2 weeks. This was the best possible outcome as servicing a mortgage and having to pay rent for a couple of months, if the re-letting process was slow, would have been stressful and costly. Thanks again, [Agent Name] and Ray white, for a pleasant rental experience.”

”As first-time home buyers, we were nervous about the whole process, but [Agent’s Name] made it a breeze. Their patience and ability to explain every step ensured we felt comfortable and informed.” [...] We cannot recommend [Agent Name] enough if you are looking for a great agent! You won’t be disappointed.”

“[Agent’s Name] took the time to understand our needs and preferences, making us feel like more than just prospective buyers. Their personalized approach and commitment to our best interests ensured we found the perfect home. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience!”

“Unlike other agents, [Agent’s Name] truly cared about our unique situation. Their agent’s customer service was unmatched, tailoring their search to fit our lifestyle and budget. If you’re looking for a good realtor review, look no further—this is the agent for you!” [...] 1. My Property Manager, [Agent Name], is the best. She works with you, is great at communicating with you, and is very professional. She did her best to respond for any questions or concerns, even after the office was closed. [Agent Name]is impressive and the best PM I’ve ever dealt with!!!!
2. Everyone knows moving can be stressful enough with the packing, unpacking, and all the other work that goes along with it. That’s why I was so thankful that my property manager, ED, in Zone 3, was extremely professional and thorough in making me feel comfortable with my moving process. Everything was explained clearly, and whenever I had a problem, ED made sure he did whatever it took to help with the situation. Keep up the outstanding job, guys!!

# File Your Complaint

You may complete a complaint form online or download one of our complaint forms. [...] # 3 Steps to File Your Complaint

blue square with the number one inside like a toy block

# Determine Where to File

We handle a variety of consumer complaints against businesses operating in Virginia, but not all complaints fall within our jurisdiction. Before filing a complaint with our office, check out our  Agency Search (opens in a new window)  feature to find the right agency to handle your complaint.

You also may click on the Common Complaint Topics listed below for more information and what agency can best assist you.

## Complaint Topics
